# Michael – Data Scientist, Dancer, Creative, Creator of autonomous cognitive systems

> Mission: Constructing infrastructure for entropy defense and preservation of ontological independence.

## About
Michael is a Data Scientist, dancer, creative, and creator of autonomous cognitive systems. This site outlines his philosophy, architecture ("Exocortex"), and fundamental axioms.

## Sections
- [Hero Section](#hero): Introduction and high-level overview.
- [Exocortex](#exocortex): Infrastructure of Sovereignty, a local autonomous intelligence architecture.
- [Axioms](#axioms): Fundamental Architecture broken down into Cognition (formal axioms of cognitive systems), Being, and Doing.

For the full detailed content of all sections, see the full version:
